prompt: I removed a Story section from my epic doc. Push changes and delete the orphaned ticket PROJ-501 which is of type Story (not a subtask).
assertions: Fetches PROJ-501's issue type and finds it is 'Story' (not 'Sub-*')
Skips deletion of PROJ-501 with a message explaining it's not a Sub-* type
Does NOT call DELETE API for PROJ-501
Reports the ticket as skipped or refused in results, indicating it is not a Sub-* type
Suggests the user delete or archive it manually via Jira web UI
